evidence.description: Implements task classification, difficulty estimation, MDR packet compilation, accuracy-first routing, provider boundaries, validation, and execution record writing.
Defines local/API model pairing, task thresholds, MDR budget, and validation policy.
Defines compact benchmark scenarios for classification, JSON extraction, and routing escalation boundary coverage.
Defines loopback-only Lemonade development service with CPU config mounted outside hidden named volumes.
Records observed WSL, Podman-backed Compose, memory, disk, Ollama, and port state.

verified: offline mock vertical slice produces required MDR/routing evidence fields
preflight command emits environment and credential state
Compose configuration renders with loopback Lemonade port mapping
blocked_or_pending: Lemonade container runtime verification is pending because docker command is backed by Podman/podman-compose in this environment.
Ollama is currently listening on 127.0.0.1:11434 and must be stopped before local Lemonade verification.
Fireworks execution is unverified because FIREWORKS_API_KEY is not configured.
Candidate local models have not been pulled or benchmarked yet.
Submission image is a scaffold until model selection and organiser constraints are known.
